h1. Demo Evidence and Test Results

h2. Purpose

Track evidence that Jira stories and platform capabilities are working.

h2. Evidence Types

* API response examples
* Search screenshots
* Vector search results
* Neo4j query results
* Lineage traversal examples
* Reindex job logs
* Access-control test results
* Golden question test results
* User feedback examples

h2. Demo Log

|| Date || Capability || Jira Items || Evidence Link || Demo Result || Notes ||
|  |  |  |  |  |  |

h2. Test Results

|| Test Set || Date || Pass Rate || Failures || Owner || Notes ||
| Exact Search |  |  |  |  |  |
| Semantic Search |  |  |  |  |  |
| Graph Lineage |  |  |  |  |  |
| Access Control |  |  |  |  |  |
| Answer Quality |  |  |  |  |  |

h2. Evidence Checklist Per Story

* Jira story key
* Component name
* Acceptance criteria tested
* Test data used
* API response or screenshot attached
* Issues/defects found
* Demo notes
* Link to Confluence component page
